---
title: "Class 19: Cancer Mutation Analysis"
author: "Paul Brencick (A17668863)"
format: html
---

## Background

We are given the DNA from a tumor that is sequenced and are trying to compare the sequence to normal tissue. We are doing this to ensure that the detected differences are not germline mutation. 

```{r}
library(bio3d)

seq <- read.fasta("A17668863_mutant_seq.fa")


```


```{r}
ref   <- seq$ali[1, ]
query <- seq$ali[2, ]

diffs <- which(ref != query)
paste0(seq$ali[1,diffs], diffs, seq$ali[2,diffs])
```

```{r}
s <- conserv(seq)

dif <- which(s != 1)
dif

```

```{r}
paste0(seq$ali[1,dif], dif, seq$ali[2,dif])
```

```{r}
seq
```
